---
applyTo: "**/*.{cpp,hpp,h,c}"
---

# C/C++ Code Review Instructions

These instructions apply specifically to C and C++ (`.c`, `.cpp`, `.h`, `.hpp`) files in this repository.

All coding standards for C/C++ files are defined in [`docs/cpp-coding-standards.md`](docs/cpp-coding-standards.md).
Refer to that document when reviewing C/C++ code.
